Index.title: Welcome to Yemeni Restaurant Paris
Index.subtitle: A Taste of Heritage and Luxury

Story.title: Our Heritage
Story.subtitle: From the mountains of Yemen to the heart of Paris.
Story.description: We bring you the authentic flavors of Yemen, prepared with ancient techniques and served with Parisian elegance. Every dish is a journey through history, from our slow-cooked Mandi to our legendary Stone Pot stews.
Story.label: Since 1994

Menu.title: The Magla Experience
Menu.subtitle: Our signature dishes, served in volcanic stone pots that preserve heat and soul.
Menu.saltahDesc: The national dish of Yemen. A rich stew with vegetables and meat, topped with fenugreek froth.
Menu.fahsaDesc: Slow-cooked shredded beef, served bubbling in a traditional stone pot.
Menu.mandiDesc: Meat cooked in traditional underground ovens, served over saffron-infused basmati rice.

Reservation.title: Request a Table
Reservation.subtitle: Experience the legendary Yemeni hospitality in the heart of Paris.
Reservation.successMessage: We look forward to welcoming you soon for an authentic Yemeni experience.
